title: Case Study Content
description: Self-contained data for a single case study. The page template imports this file and iterates cs.sections, passing each entry to CaseStudySection.astro which dispatches on `type`. To add a new case study: create a new file here and add a one-line entry to manifest.json. To add a new section type: add the enum value here, add a branch in CaseStudySection.astro, and add a row to the type catalog in ARCHITECTURE.md.

title.description: Browser tab title and OG title.

accent.description: Brand accent color as a 6-digit hex, e.g. "#3b1a5a".

label.description: Small eyebrow label above the title.

image.description: Standalone hero image (right-side device mockup). Use either image or background, not both.

imageAlt.description: Alt text for the standalone hero image.

background.description: Full-bleed background photograph. Use either image or background, not both.

challenge.description: One-line challenge statement, displayed as the section heading.

role.description: Job title for the meta grid.

company.description: Company or client name for the meta grid.

scope.description: Scope of work for the meta grid.

team.description: Team composition or key outcome for the meta grid.

body.description: Full prose paragraph describing the engagement.

sections.description: Ordered list of sections. Render order follows array order. Each entry is dispatched by CaseStudySection.astro based on its `type` field.

value.description: Display number or text, e.g. "4.4M" or "$300M".

label.description: Descriptor below the value, e.g. "Mobile Users".

key.description: Unique identifier for this section within the study. Used for debugging and future anchor links. Not rendered.

type.description: Determines which component tree CaseStudySection renders. See ARCHITECTURE.md § Section Type Catalog for field requirements per type.

label.description: Small eyebrow label above the section heading.

bg.description: Background color or CSS gradient for the section. Any valid CSS value: hex (#f3eff8), named color, gradient, etc.

isDark.description: Activate the dark variant of ShowcaseSection and ShowcaseCard. Background defaults to color-mix(accent, 80%, black) unless darkBg is set.

darkBg.description: Overrides the computed dark background. Use when the accent-derived dark doesn't match the brand palette (e.g. Upwave charcoal #1e1e1e, Sparks Grove navy #0b1b2b). Sets --case-study-dark on the wrapper.

columns.description: Grid column count. Collapses to 1 column below 1024px regardless.

primaryCard.description: Lead card rendered full-width (1-column grid) above secondaryCards.

secondaryCards.description: Supporting cards rendered in a 2-column grid beneath primaryCard.

reverse.description: Flip image and text order so the image appears on the right.

image.description: Full-width constrained image rendered inside the section.

imageWidth.description: Intrinsic width hint for Astro image optimisation.

imageHeight.description: Intrinsic height hint for Astro image optimisation.

image.description: Full-viewport cinematic image strip. No text is rendered.
Full content-width image. Use high-resolution source (1800px+ wide).

caption.description: Single caption line below the image. One short sentence — a chapter marker, not a description.

images.description: Images to display in the grid. No per-image text — the images speak for themselves.

stats.description: Impact metrics displayed as large typographic numbers. Keep to 2–5 items.
